overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking along an elevated walkway in a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player moves through a narrow corridor with towering glass buildings and vibrant signage, then approaches two NPCs standing at an open balcony overlooking a bustling market street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway above market street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway through the cyberpunk city corridor, looking down at the market stalls below

entered.detail: large vertical purple neon sign with 'DEEP' text mounted on the right wall
pink neon sign depicting a motorcycle on the left building facade
numerous market stalls with colorful canopies visible on the street level below
tall futuristic glass and steel towers rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow elevated walkway in a dense cyberpunk city. Purple and pink neon signs illuminate the corridor while market stalls bustle below. The architecture features towering glass skyscrapers with sunlight filtering down between them.

scene_state.functional_zone: open balcony overlook with city vista

events.description: emerging from the covered corridor into the open balcony area with two NPCs
player stops walking and approaches the two NPCs standing at the railing

agents.ego_description: standing next to two NPCs at the balcony railing, looking out over the cyberpunk cityscape and market below

notable_agents.action: male and female characters standing at the railing looking out at the city view

entered.detail: two characters standing at the balcony railing overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: The player reaches an open balcony overlook where two NPCs stand at the railing. The camera stops to observe the expansive cyberpunk city view with neon signs and market activity visible below. The purple neon sign remains visible on the right while the pink motorcycle sign disappears from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow elevated walkway that opens into a wide urban overlook. It begins by gliding through a dense corridor of towering glass skyscrapers, where purple and pink neon signs cast a vibrant glow over the path and sunlight filters down from above. As the camera advances, the enclosed feeling of the walkway gives way to an open balcony where two NPCs stand waiting at the railing. The scene then expands to reveal an expansive view of the bustling market street below, while the pink motorcycle sign fades behind the camera and the purple neon light remains visible to the right.
